description.value: Price 7,200 gp; Slot ring; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint conjuration [good] DESCRIPTION This ring is cut from transparent crystal. If the wearer can cast summon monster spells, the wearer adds cassisian to the 3rd-level list of monsters she can summon with those spells, adds movanic deva to the 7th-level list, and adds monadic deva to the 8th-level list. Also, once per day on command the wearer can use this ring to summon a cassisian, as if by the summon monster III spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,600 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells planar ally or planar binding; Special creator must be good
